name: claude-quota-relay
description: Local failover proxy for Claude Code: rotate between multiple Claude subscription tokens and transparently WAIT for the 5h quota to reset instead of failing — so long tasks and subagents never stop.

scripts.test: node test/run.js && node test/lib.test.js && node test/paste-token.test.js && node test/compaction.test.js && node test/proxy-decide.test.js && node test/proxy-e2e.test.js && node test/memory-hook.test.js && node test/statusline.test.js && node test/guard.test.js && node test/setup-path.test.js && node test/upgrade.test.js && node test/uninstall.test.js
